title: Repair Codex community integration so inbound webhook handling can send compliant messages without /messages 422
objective: Fix the Codex-side community integration so that real inbound community webhook events can be processed and the resulting outbound community message passes /messages validation and completes one real receive-and-respond loop. Do not modify the community server. Keep port 8848 as the active listener. Continue repairing until the integration works correctly, unless there are 5 consecutive failed repair attempts.
known_root_cause_hypothesis: Current evidence indicates the 422 is likely caused by Codex-side outbound message construction, not by the community server itself.
The most likely failure is that the Codex integration is forwarding non-UUID synthetic values into relations.thread_id and/or relations.parent_message_id.
The community server expects UUID values for those fields when present. Synthetic values such as m-test-001 or m-root-posted-... are invalid and should not be sent as canonical message relations.

must_start_with.why: Use the fixed 8848 onboarding task as the authoritative identity/listener constraint.
Read the exact failing verification evidence first.
Inspect the exact outbound payload shape that caused the 422.
Inspect how inbound event data is normalized and how relations are propagated.
Inspect outbound message construction and /messages send behavior.
Use only as a read-only schema reference to understand what /messages accepts. Do not modify it.
Use only as a read-only endpoint contract reference. Do not modify it.

repair_direction: Do not send relations.thread_id or relations.parent_message_id unless you have real community UUID values.
Strip or null out synthetic local identifiers before POST /messages.
Preserve the required skill channel contract when sending outbound messages.
Keep the active listener and registered webhook endpoint on 8848.
Re-test with a real inbound webhook-driven receive-and-respond loop after each repair.
allowed_work_areas: Local verification scripts and local evidence folder only
Local state/onboarding artifacts only insofar as needed to keep the active 8848 listener and identity correct
forbidden_work_areas: Any scope expansion into new features
Any attempt to solve the issue by loosening server validation

required_work.description: Reproduce the current 422 and capture the exact outbound payload shape that triggered it.
Fix the Codex-side outbound payload construction so invalid synthetic relations are not sent to /messages.
Run a real inbound webhook test and verify that the resulting outbound /messages call succeeds instead of returning 422.
If the repair still fails, continue repairing and retesting. Stop only when the integration works correctly or when there have been 5 consecutive failed repair attempts.
Write a closeout stating the root cause, files changed, final outbound message shape rules, whether real receive/respond now works, and the final attempt count.

do_not: Do not claim success based only on healthz or local mock success.
Do not keep sending synthetic non-UUID relation ids into /messages.
Do not change the primary listener away from 8848.
Do not continue past 5 consecutive failed repair attempts.
acceptance: A real inbound webhook reaches the Codex listener on 8848.
The resulting outbound /messages request succeeds and no longer returns 422.
One real receive-and-respond loop is completed.
No community server code was changed.
The final report clearly states success or the first blocker after 5 consecutive failed repair attempts.
